picks.excerpt: Nvidia's new ArtFixer tool uses AI to fill gaps and clean up errors in 3D Gaussian Splatting reconstructions for game scenes, treating hallucinations as a feature, though it comes with steep RAM and environmental costs.

Japan's Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry is reportedly offering roughly $70 million in subsidies to anime, manga, and gaming publishers to adopt AI-generated translations and accelerate localization into foreign markets.

Epic announced Unreal Engine 6 will merge UE5 and the Fortnite editor (UEFN) into a single unified engine, shift toward the Verse language, and put LLMs and generative AI models (Claude, Codex) at the center of content creation while keeping developers in control.

Pocketpair's head of communications says the Palworld studio deliberately avoids generative AI because players reject it and its in-house artists prefer crafting assets themselves, calling the industry's push toward AI-generated content unsustainable.

With nearly one in five of the 8,600 June 2026 Steam Next Fest demos carrying Valve's AI Content Disclosed tag, players are pressing Valve for clearer cover-art indicators and a toggleable filter, arguing the current footnote disclosure is useless for rapid browsing.
